title: Webhooks
description: Create a webhook endpoint, secure it with signature verification, test it with curl, and process the incoming payload.

steps.instruction: Create a new webhook endpoint that receives POST requests at `/webhooks/incoming`.
steps.action: The terminal runs `openclaw webhook create --path "/webhooks/incoming" --name "external-trigger"` which registers the endpoint in the Gateway.
steps.expectedOutput: `Webhook created: external-trigger at /webhooks/incoming`. `openclaw webhook list` shows the new endpoint with a generated URL.

steps.instruction: Set up HMAC signature verification to secure the webhook endpoint.
steps.action: The terminal runs `openclaw webhook secure external-trigger --algo hmac-sha256 --secret "$WEBHOOK_SECRET"` which enables signature checking on incoming requests.
steps.expectedOutput: `Security enabled: hmac-sha256`. The webhook details now show `signature: hmac-sha256` and `secret: env:WEBHOOK_SECRET`.

steps.instruction: Test the webhook by sending a signed curl request with a sample payload.
steps.action: The terminal runs `curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/webhooks/incoming -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Signature: <computed>" -d '{"event":"user.signup","name":"Alice"}'`.
steps.expectedOutput: The Gateway logs `Webhook received: external-trigger` and validates the signature. The HTTP response is `200 OK` with `{"status":"accepted","event":"user.signup"}`.

steps.instruction: Handle the webhook payload by configuring an automation that processes incoming events.
steps.action: An automation rule is added: `{"trigger":"webhook:external-trigger","condition":"event == 'user.signup'","action":"agent:invoke","prompt":"Welcome {{name}} to our platform!"}`.
steps.expectedOutput: After re-sending the curl request, the Gateway log shows the automation matched and the agent was invoked. The agent's welcome message is logged.

completionMessage: Congratulations! Your webhook endpoint is live and secured with HMAC signatures. External services can now trigger agent actions by sending signed POST requests.
